hero.title: IG Tracker
hero.subtitle: Instagram Follower Analyzer
hero.description: Discover who follows you back, who doesn't, and how your audience changes over time. 100% local — no servers, no password, no tracking.

features.title: Everything you need to understand your audience
features.subtitle: Powerful analysis, beautiful interface, zero compromises on privacy.

nonFollowers.title: Find non-followers
nonFollowers.desc: See exactly who doesn't follow you back and unfollow them silently.

notFollowingBack.title: Not following back
notFollowingBack.desc: Find accounts you follow that don't follow you back.

mutuals.title: Mutual followers
mutuals.desc: Connect with people who follow you and that you follow.

snapshots.title: History snapshots
snapshots.desc: Save up to 20 snapshots per account and compare changes over time.

search.title: Filterable lists
search.desc: Search any list by username or full name in milliseconds.

fast.title: Fast & lightweight
fast.desc: Typical analysis of 5,000 followers takes under a minute.

badges.noPassword: We don't ask for your password

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps. No setup, no account.

install.title: Install the extension
install.desc: Add IG Tracker to Chrome from the Web Store. It's free and takes 5 seconds.

open.title: Open Instagram
open.desc: Log in to your Instagram account, then click the extension icon in your toolbar.

analyze.title: Analyze any account
analyze.desc: Type a username (yours or any public one) and let it run. Done in under a minute.

screenshots.title: See it in action
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, dark, full-page interface — built for clarity.

items.name: Lucía Fernández
items.quote: Finally I know who actually follows me. I use it monthly to track how my audience evolves.

items.name: Martín Acosta
items.quote: Love that it's 100% local. No servers, no tracking, no asking for my password. This is how it should be.

items.name: Sofía Pereyra
items.quote: Spotting fans and non-followbacks in seconds is gold. Already recommended it to several friends.

items.name: Diego Romero
items.quote: Snapshots are the best feature. I can see exactly who unfollowed after each campaign.

privacy.title: Privacy first, always
privacy.subtitle: Your data never leaves your device.

points.title: 100% local
points.desc: All analysis runs in your own browser. There is no server in between.

points.title: No password
points.desc: We never ask for your Instagram password. The extension uses your existing browser session.

points.title: No tracking
points.desc: We don't collect analytics, telemetry, or personal data. Period.

points.title: Open about permissions
points.desc: Each Chrome permission is documented and used only for what's strictly needed.

items.a: Yes. The extension is 100% free, with no premium tier and no ads.

items.q: Will Instagram know I'm using it?
items.a: The extension uses the same public endpoints Instagram's own web app uses. Nothing is unfollowed automatically and no actions are taken on your behalf.

items.q: Do I need to give you my password?
items.a: Never. The extension works with your existing Instagram browser session. We literally cannot read your password.
Locally, in your browser's storage (chrome.storage.local). Nothing is uploaded anywhere. If you uninstall the extension, the data is gone.

items.q: Can I analyze accounts that aren't mine?
items.a: You can analyze any public account, or private accounts you have access to. The extension fetches the same data Instagram already shows you.

items.q: How many snapshots can I save?
items.a: Up to 20 snapshots per account, so you can compare changes over time.

footer.tagline: Built with care. Local, private, free.
